title: Zero In Dual Action Gel Ant Bait Station – Twinpack, Honey, Safely Enclosed, Kills Ant Nests, Ready-To-Use
features: TWINPACK: Value-for-money control of ants and theirs nests in and around the home
DISCREET: Unique, triangular corner-fit design for easy and secure placement in any home room
NO TOUCH: Clean and easy push-top activation without any tear tops or mess
SAFER: Sealed bait sachet to protect children and pets from accidental bait contact
EFFECTIVE: Destroys nests and whole ant colonies indoors and out, including larvae, worker and queen ants
NATURAL: Honey-based bait is irresistible to feeding ants and lethal to the ant colony
INDOOR USE: Ideal for kitchens, conservatories, and other home rooms
description: From the manufacturer TARGETS HOUSEHOLD PESTS Zero In brings you a comprehensive range of pest control solutions for household pests, including flies, wasps, mosquitoes, bed bugs, fleas, clothes moths and more. Everything you need to live pest-free Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in pest control for over 25 years Zero In Dual Action Gel Ant Bait – 2 Pack Kills ants and the nest Kill ants and their nest with the ready-to-use Dual Action Gel Ant Bait stations from Zero In. Worker ants are attracted to the bait and take the specially formulated gel from the station back to the nest, destroying the entire colony. The stations are safe to use around children and pets with the bait safely enclosed inside and unobtainable by non-target species. Specially formulated gel destroys both ants and the nest. Pre-baited ready-to-use bait stations. Bait is enclosed to prevent access by children and pets. Contains 1R-trans phenothrin. Product Highlights Kills Ants & The Nest Dual action formula kills ants and the nest. Worker ants are attracted to the bait and take the specially formulated gel from the station back to the nest, destroying the entire colony. Ready-to-Use No mess and no fuss, the Dual Action Gel Ant Bait stations are easily activated and ready-to-use for effective ant control in the home. Child & Pet Safe The stations are safe to use around children and pets with the bait safely enclosed inside and unobtainable by non-target species. All-Round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of crawling insect control solutions including traps, sprays, powders and more - everything you need for complete protection against crawling insects. 1-2-3 Ant & Crawling Insect Control Target The Pest When ants start to invade your kitchen and home use Zero In Ant & Crawling Insect Killer for an instant knockdown and kill with additional residual action to stop repeat infestations. Perimeter Defence Keep ants out of your home with targeted treatment of sills, steps, paving, doorways, and other cracks and crevices around access points to the home. Kill Their Nest Kill both ants and their nest with Zero In Dual Action Gel Ant Bait Station. Worker ants take the specially formulated gel from the station back to the nest, destroying the entire colony.
